title: Fix deprecated MeshPacket::delayed field in lichen-meshtastic test
description: Clippy fails due to use of deprecated MeshPacket::delayed field (line 257 in lichen-meshtastic/src/lib.rs). The protobuf definition has changed; remove the field or use #[allow(deprecated)] temporarily but prefer updating to current API for Rust consistency. This is a P0 for build. Part of codereview pass 2 under epic project-LICHEN-wu53.
close_reason: Fixed by adding #[allow(deprecated)] to constructors and retaining field=0 as required by prost struct literal. Clippy and cargo check now pass for lichen-meshtastic. Updated lichen-meshtastic/src/lib.rs:231 and bridge.rs functions.
